author: crossfit-claude-skills contributors
purpose: A standalone, coordinated set of CrossFit / mixed-modal functional-fitness coaching skills: workout and program design, stimulus-preserving scaling, movement progression and fault analysis, athlete assessment, class delivery and onboarding, coaching-level nutrition, injury-aware adaptation, and competition and credential preparation. Each skill is trigger-precise and routes to the narrowest applicable specialist.
intended_users: Coaches preparing for credentials or judging
Gym staff building onboarding / on-ramp programs
routing_guide: Start at crossfit-pack-router for ambiguous or multi-part requests; it routes to the narrowest applicable skill(s) and is not itself a source of domain instructions. Single workout -> crossfit-workout-designer. Multiweek programming -> crossfit-programming-cycle-builder. Focused single-quality block -> crossfit-specialty-cycle-builder. Audit existing programming -> crossfit-programming-auditor. Update a plan after real-world results -> crossfit-adaptive-training-plan-manager. How to scale / preserve stimulus -> crossfit-stimulus-and-scaling-coach. Build a skill over time -> crossfit-movement-progression-builder. Diagnose a movement error from observation -> crossfit-movement-fault-analyzer. Cue selection -> crossfit-coaching-cue-generator. Swap equipment -> crossfit-equipment-substitution-engine. Assess an athlete -> crossfit-athlete-assessment; rank what to fix -> crossfit-weakness-prioritizer; test battery -> crossfit-benchmark-and-testing-builder; mobility -> crossfit-mobility-assessment-and-programmer; progress report -> crossfit-athlete-progress-report. Class plan -> crossfit-class-plan-builder; floor logistics -> crossfit-class-logistics-and-floor-manager; onboarding -> crossfit-foundations-and-onramp-builder; special populations -> crossfit-population-adaptation-coach. Nutrition habits -> crossfit-nutrition-habit-coach. Pain / restrictions -> safety/referral first, then crossfit-injury-aware-workout-adapter. Competition macro plan -> crossfit-competition-preparation-planner; released-workout strategy -> crossfit-competition-workout-strategist; rule interpretation -> crossfit-rules-and-standards-advisor. Credential study -> crossfit-credential-preparation-coach; coach evaluation -> crossfit-coach-performance-reviewer.
example_workflows: Assessment -> weakness prioritization -> specialty cycle -> adaptive updates -> progress report
Workout design -> stimulus & scaling -> class plan -> logistics -> athlete briefing
safety_behavior: Every coaching skill applies the shared safety-and-referral framework proportionately: it stays in coaching scope (no diagnosis, medical rehab, medication, eating-disorder treatment, clinician override, or outcome guarantees), refers red-flag symptoms (chest pain, syncope, severe dyspnea, neurological symptoms, suspected fracture/major trauma, acute joint instability, rapid swelling, severe/unexplained pain, rhabdomyolysis warning signs emphasized for high-volume CrossFit, heat illness, disordered-eating indicators, pregnancy/postpartum complications, and non-resolving symptoms), never fabricates athlete data, and returns clearly labeled provisional answers when data is missing.
rule_version_status: No proprietary rulebooks are embedded. Rules-dependent skills (crossfit-rules-and-standards-advisor, crossfit-competition-workout-strategist) check event/season/division, use only a matching versioned source from references/source-version-registry.json, warn when stale, require the user to supply or confirm official rule text, and otherwise return a clearly labeled conditional analysis. The registry currently contains only an illustrative placeholder; supply authorized sources before relying on rule-specific answers.
notes: This independent skill repository is not official, endorsed, sponsored, approved, or certified by CrossFit, LLC or its affiliates. Because brand authorization is undocumented (brand_authorized=false), the pack is presented under the neutral display name 'Functional Fitness Coaching Pack'.
